N_P33A_PBD_UDS_PT_20201023

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 713
Recv ID: 733
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: A7
Func Name: PBD

[
  {
    "diagversion": "32",
    "supplier": "123456789A",
    "soft": "Z17G943886",
    "version": "AMCO2"
  }
